description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish DEB Packages that can be triggered manually with a workflow dispatch or called by another workflow. The workflow takes two required inputs: channel and run_id. It uses a ubuntu-24.04 job matrix to build for debian12 and ubuntu24.04 distributions. For each distribution, it checks out the repository, downloads DEB artifacts from a previous workflow run, creates a DEB repository by syncing from S3, adding the downloaded packages, and then uploading the updated repository to S3.
